channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran war live: Trump, Pezeshkian sign MoU to end fighting, reopen Hormuz
item.description: Both sides say the deal is in effect and includes an end to war in Lebanon and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump to Netanyahu: Use a ‘softer’ touch on Lebanon
item.description: US President Donald Trump has encouraged Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to use a ‘softer touch’ in Lebanon.

item.title: Trump says it’s ‘unfair’ for Iran to lack ballistic missiles
item.description: President Donald Trump says it’s ‘unfair’ for Iran to lack ballistic missiles if other regional countries have them.

item.title: Diplomat confirms that US and Iran have signed MoU electronically
item.description: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says the agreement has been finalised and signed with the US.

item.title: Kane double fires England past Croatia in World Cup thriller
item.description: Harry Kane scores twice, while Jude Bellingham and Marcus Rashford also net, as England beat Croatia 4-2 in 2026 opener.

item.title: Al Jazeera journalist reunited with family in Khartoum after years of war
item.description: Al Jazeera journalist Al-Tahir al-Mardi has been reunited with his family in Khartoum after three years of separation.

item.title: Huawei CFO’s admissions can be used at criminal trial, US judge rules
item.description: CFO Meng Wanzhou said in 2021 that Huawei illegally conducted business in Iran.

item.title: Thieves with bulldozer carry out ATM heist in 4 minutes
item.description: CCTV footage released by police shows thieves using a bulldozer to tear an ATM from the front of a bank.

item.title: Meet Yoane Wissa, who scored DR Congo’s first-ever goal at a World Cup
item.description: Wissa, who nearly lost his sight in 2021, scored a header marking DR Congo’s historic return to the World Cup.

item.title: Gilgo Beach killer sentenced to life without parole
item.description: New York’s Gilgo Beach serial killer Rex Heuermann was sentenced to life without parole for the murders of eight women.

item.title: Croatia fans rock cowboy style in Dallas parade ahead of match with England
item.description: Thousands of Croatia supporters turned downtown Dallas into a sea of red and white ahead of face-off with England.

item.title: ‘Don’t meddle’: Lula calls on Trump to stay out of Brazil’s elections
item.description: Lula is currently in a tight race for re-election against right-wing candidate Flavio Bolsonaro, an ally of Trump.

item.title: Why was India’s Cockroach Janta Party founder attacked?
item.description: Why was India’s Cockroach Janta Party founder attacked?

item.title: Read the US account of unreleased 14-point Iran ceasefire memorandum
item.description: US official gives clearest account yet of deal set to be signed by US and Iran Friday; Iran has not confirmed text.

item.title: Palestinian residents shocked by devastation in West Bank refugee camp
item.description: Palestinian families briefly returned to Tulkarem refugee camp after more than a year of forced displacement.

item.title: ‘Send them back’ chants in EU Parliament after anti-migrant bill passes
item.description: ‘Send them back’ chants in EU Parliament after anti-migrant bill passes.

item.title: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha’s mother gets visa to attend World Cup
item.description: Ana Candida Evora and Vozinha 'will be reunited in Miami' for Cape Verde's match against Uruguay on Sunday.

item.title: Portugal held to draw by DR Congo in World Cup 2026 opener
item.description: Joao Neves opens the scoring for Portugal with early goal, but Yoane Wissa equalises in first-half injury time.

item.title: Freed Palestinian prisoner meets son conceived with smuggled sperm
item.description: After spending 25 years in Israeli prisons, Abdul Karim al-Rimawi embraced his son Majd for the first time.

item.title: Trump eyes US-Iran ‘peace deal’ signing
item.description: A US-Iran agreement aimed at ending hostilities and reopening the Strait of Hormuz is set to be signed Friday.

item.title: Ukrainian rescuers killed in Russian secondary strike laid to rest
item.description: Mourners gathered at a cemetery in Kharkiv as three Ukrainian rescuers were laid to rest.

item.title: Tehran says considering plan for Iran, US presidents to sign deal
item.description: Trump says he expects the agreement with Iran to be signed 'shortly' without specifying the exact date.

item.title: Will Ukraine become an EU member?
item.description: Ukraine has opened the first phase of membership talks with the ‌European Union.

item.title: Police clash with Malawian protesters demanding deportation in South Africa
item.description: Police clash with Malawian protesters demanding deportation in South Africa

item.title: Trump: World will ‘find out pretty soon’ if Iran MOU signing will happen
item.description: Trump suggests deal signing on Friday could still fall through, vows to bomb Iran if they don't 'behave'.
